message:
fix(obligation): correct lattice join test for different kinds

The test for joining VarState with different obligation kinds was
incorrectly checking for MayHold when MayHoldAmbiguous is the expected
result:

- Before: asserted matches!(r, VarState::MayHold(_))
- After: asserts r == VarState::MayHoldAmbiguous

When two Held states with different kinds (e.g., SendPermit and IoOp)
are joined at a control flow merge point, the result should be
MayHoldAmbiguous since we cannot statically determine which kind the
variable holds. The implementation was correct; only the test assertion
was wrong.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
